name: Shepherd's Pie #5
recipeIngredient: 1 package (10 ounces) frozen peas, thawed and drained, or 1 pound fresh peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in salted water until tender when pierced with a fork. Drain well and peel.
2. Mash the potatoes with butter, milk, salt, and pepper to taste. Set aside.
3. Sauté beef over medium heat until browned and crumbly. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Add chopped tomatoes, mushrooms, parsley, tomato paste, Worcestershire sauce, and gravy to the beef mixture. Stir to combine.
5. Add peas and cook for about 5 minutes until heated through.
6. Turn the meat mixture into a casserole dish.
7. Spread mashed potatoes evenly over the top of the meat mixture.
8. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 40 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and crispy.
